summary: Rule chunk from The Rules page 60, chunk 6.

mechanics.raw_text: That's it, yeah, to shut {down the reactor you've got to pull those ‘graphite rods all the way out of the nuclear pile. Something like that, anyway. Player: Urrgh. Uh, is there a control for the ‘raphite rods nearby? GM: Why; now that you mention it there sure is, What was your clone number? Biosciences: Deals with biological science and technology — experimental drugs, genetic ‘engineering, cyborging, etc. ‘Chemical: Deals with chemistry — explosives, gases, photography, batteries, stuf ike that. 60
